race.comment: PALLADIUM (6) returned for his second campaign with a battling fourth in a tougher contest over 1300m at Echuca. Blinkers go on today and gets the gun run from the inside gate. Go closed. LORD LIMERICK (3) two runs back have been excellent and has his hoof on the till over this trip. Went out quickly and held on late with a battling third over 1200m at Wagga. On the quick back-up and deserves another chance. BEACHED AS BRO (1) used up early from the outside draw with a tiring ninth over 1400m at Wagga. Earlier runs had merit and no shock to see him take this out. MEKA VIBE (5) just over a month between runs when back in trip for a battling tenth over 1300m at Wangaratta. Well placed on this occasion and can play a leading role.
